task: Find out what to do when I lose an item on a bus on us.megabus.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to us.megabus.com, opened the Help/FAQ page, expanded the FAQ item 'What do I do if I lost an item on the bus?', and extracted the relevant instructions shown on the site: report the lost item by filling out the linked form, after submission it is processed by the lost and found department, responses may take several days, and Megabus will attempt to return the item. The trajectory also shows the linked form URL resolves to /contact-us. This satisfies the task of finding out what to do when an item is lost on a bus on us.megabus.
final_result_response:
On us.megabus.com, the FAQ says:

- Report the lost item to Megabus’ Lost and Found department by filling out the linked form.
- The FAQ’s “form” link points to: https://us.megabus.com/contact-us
- After you submit the item details, Megabus enters it into their Lost and Found system.
- Their Lost and Found team responds to all inquiries, but it may take several days because they need to investigate.
- Megabus says they’ll try to return lost items and help with retrieval as best they can.
action_history: Opening Megabus site: const p1 = await openTab('https://us.megabus.com/');
Reading lost item FAQ: await page.locator('e25').click();
Opening lost item form: await page.locator('e93').click();
Searching site for lost item info: await openTab(searchUrl1);
Using FAQ search for lost item: await page.locator('e16').fill('lost item');
Using FAQ search for lost item: await page.locator('e17').click();
Reading searched FAQ answer: await page.locator('e19').click();
